description: Enzyme→substrate causal edges, competitive inhibition edges, module-to-module/node execution edges, and Phase 6 CEDT maps_to_twin_state adapter edges. Do NOT mutate registry_graph.json baseline.

edges.reaction: NNK → α-hydroxy-NNK (much lower efficiency than CYP2A13)

sources: Turesky et al., referenced in PMC1829392

edges.reaction: N-OH-PhIP → N-sulfonyloxy-PhIP (further activation) OR competing detox sulfation

edges.note: exposure_multiplier + tissue_conc_uM fed as substrate input
carcinogen_class determines relevant genotype modifier enzymes
flux scores feed competitive inhibition calculation
activation scores feed ROS burden
tissue_expression_weight scales enzyme Vmax
activity_multiplier applied to effective_Vmax
GSH_pool_fraction feeds oxidative stress capacity
flux_ratio and adduct_types feed signature prediction
oxidative_adduct_score feeds SBS18-type signature
predicted_SBS_signature → state_quality twin variable
exposure_multiplier → ExposureIntensity twin variable
activation_score → MetabolicActivationScore twin variable
activity_multiplier → EnzymeActivityModifier host variable
tissue_expression_weight → TissueExpressionContext
provenance records back Km/Ki values used by flux module
provenance records index competitive inhibition ki_status
biomarker_mapping S_over_Km ratios parameterize exposure scenarios
exposure_multiplier → exposure_intensity twin variable (identity). Real scalar from WAVE2 param record.
exposure_multiplier → exposure_multiplier twin variable (direct identity copy).
tissue_conc_uM context → exposure_class twin variable (categorical from carcinogen_class field).
tissue_conc_uM context → exposure_duration_context (categorical from scenario exposure_scenario key).
activation_score → metabolic_activation_score (identity). MM-computed; regression-tested. Primary T-maturity mapping.
detoxification_score → metabolic_detoxification_score (identity). 0.0 when all detox enzymes lack Vmax.
flux_ratio → metabolic_flux_ratio (identity). activation/max(detox,0.001). Core twin-ready (T) output; regression-tested at 1e-6.
GSH_pool_fraction → gsh_pool_fraction. Null in Phase 5 scenarios (INTERACTION not run — no co-exposure inputs).
synergy_flag (boolean) → susceptibility_index modifier (categorical). Null in Phase 5 scenarios; no co-exposure inputs.
ROS_burden → oxidative_stress_level. Null in Phase 5 (OxStress not run; no HeavyMetal/ROS input).
oxidative_adduct_score → adduct_burden. Null in Phase 5 (OxStress not run; same reason as oxidative_stress_level).
activity_multiplier → enzyme_activity_modifier dict {gene: genotype_multiplier}. Real values from Phase 5 run outputs.
activity_multiplier → susceptibility_index = mean(genotype_multiplier) across all enzymes. Derived from per_enzyme_mm_rates.
tissue_expression_weight context → tissue_context_id (categorical from scenario tissue field).
tissue_expression_weight → mean(tissue_weight) across enzymes with non-null weight. Real GTEx-derived values.
tissue_expression_weight → tissue_sensitivity = max(tissue_weight) across activation-pathway enzymes.
predicted_SBS_signature → predicted_mutational_signature (full SBS list). Real Phase 5 golden run; regression-tested.
dominant_mutation → dominant_mutation twin variable (identity). Real string from MutSig parameter lookup.
confidence → evidence_confidence (categorical: high/medium/exploratory). From MutSig confidence rule (high when flux_ratio >= 5.0).

provenance_record → evidence_confidence (categorical-lookup, D-maturity). EVIDENCE module is maturity C; no direct numeric output. evidence_confidence populated from MUTSIG adapter (0093); this edge documents the provenance relationship. Honest: no numeric twin value computed from provenance_record alone.
